name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability, agent, skill, template, or workflow improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What product manager workflow problem does this solve?

## Proposed change

Describe the requested change.

## Affected area

- Agent
- Skill
- Workflow
- Artifact contract
- Template
- Example
- Documentation
- Guardrail
- Tool protocol

## Expected output

What should PM Copilot produce differently after this change?

## Alternatives considered

List any simpler alternatives.

## Privacy or safety impact

Does this involve sensitive data, payments, legal, compliance, or source-backed research?
